reviews.comment:
Carísimo todo. No solo la NAFTA se las dan de ACA ( automóvil club argentino) y así te vacunan.

(Translated by Google)
Everything is incredibly expensive. Not only do they try to pass off the gasoline as being from the ACA (Argentine Automobile Club), but they also rip you off.
